title: Bridge Essay: Altered states: psychedelics and anesthetics.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nonordinary — psychedelic decoupling, ego dissolution, DMN disruption, altered states.

**Altered states: psychedelics and anesthetics.**. Anesthesiology.. PMID: 24061599. DOI: 10.1097/01.anes.0000435635.42332.ee. The psychedelic experience has been reported since antiquity, but there is relatively little known about the underlying neural mechanisms. Arecent neuroimaging study on psilocybin revealed apattern of decreased cerebral blood flow and functional disconnections that is surprisingly similar to that caused by various anesthetics.
